title: Duplicate /config resource on gateway CoAP service
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_config.c:830 vs apps/gateway/src/main.c:506. Two resources with path 'config' register on the same lichen_coap service when CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_CONFIG=y (gateway prj.conf:32): the spec §17.5.2 schema (name/role/radio/identity) and the gateway's own non-spec schema (tx_power, manual location). Which wins is link-order dependent. Compounding: lichen_coap_config_register() is never called anywhere, so if the spec handler wins it always answers 4.04. Fix: delete or rename the gateway-local /config; register a real provider in the app.
